creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Build fails on armv7 and arm64 FreeBSD 14.0:

In file included from /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-mgmt/ipfixcol2/work/ipfixcol2-2.6.0/src/tools/fdsdump/src/aggregator/hashT
able.cpp:9:                                                                                                            
/usr/lib/clang/16/include/xmmintrin.h:14:2: error: "This header is only meant to be used on x86 and x64 architecture"  
#error "This header is only meant to be used on x86 and x64 architecture"                                              
 ^                                                                                                                     
In file included from /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-mgmt/ipfixcol2/work/ipfixcol2-2.6.0/src/tools/fdsdump/src/aggregator/hashT
able.cpp:9:                                                                                                            
In file included from /usr/lib/clang/16/include/xmmintrin.h:17:                                                        
/usr/lib/clang/16/include/mmintrin.h:14:2: error: "This header is only meant to be used on x86 and x64 architecture"
#error "This header is only meant to be used on x86 and x64 architecture"                                              
 ^
